creator: mmitchel@gmail.com
text:
Detection of persistent disk, at logical unit 1 and 2; there is only one attached disk, so this is probably a kernel issue. output from the google compute vm instance console attached; notice the entry for da0 and da1. there is only one persistent disk configured. use of the partition editor shows its the same disk, as modifications to one boot record appear on the second target (mirrored).

Changing serial settings was 0/0 now 3/0
